title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises!
